title: machilus coriaceus
intro: Machilus coriaceus, also known as the rough machilus or Machilus, is a species of plant in the laurel family that is native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Machilus coriaceus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
